title: Integrate workflow product builder and repair dependency state
summary: Safely integrate the completed workflow-foundry-006 and workflow-foundry-015 feature branch into main, reconcile stale and dirty tracker state without losing unrelated work, activate the canonical $build-workflow-product capability from main, and prove that downstream workflows can resolve the capability before any final push checkpoint.
acceptance_criteria: the completed codex/build-workflow-product branch and its remote commit identities are verified before integration
an isolated integration candidate begins from the current remote main lineage and includes the complete workflow-foundry-006 and workflow-foundry-015 commit chain
unrelated dirty and untracked work is inventoried and preserved without destructive reset, checkout, overwrite, or silent omission
overlapping tracker files are reconciled semantically so completed 006 and 015 state is retained while newer project and task entries are preserved
main-equivalent integrated state records workflow-foundry-006 and workflow-foundry-015 as done and exposes the canonical build-workflow-product skill
downstream dependency consumers can resolve workflow-foundry-015 as an active completed capability without mutating their trackers inside this task
root workflow-state validation and the complete workflow-foundry tracker verification pass against the isolated integrated snapshot
release, catalog, routing, readiness, generated-output, build, diff, and secret checks pass without weakening existing gates
an integration evidence artifact records commit ancestry, reconciled files, validation results, downstream readiness, remaining risks, and the exact adoption procedure
no main-branch update, merge, commit, or push occurs without the task phase approvals and the required explicit operator checkpoint

context_snapshot.summary: Load the complete foundry tracker, both completed feature-branch task states, current main dirty state, downstream dependency consumers, validation surfaces, and Git ancestry before planning or executing integration.

approved_artifacts.approval_note: The operator approved direct full PRD synthesis for workflow-foundry-016 without user-facing grilling and authorized evidence-based self-grilling.
Approved as the blocker-first isolated candidate and inventory slice for the integration plan.
Approved as the versioned tracker reconciliation and minimal migration slice.
Approved as the downstream readiness, complete verification, and independent review slice.
Approved as the explicit adoption, remote verification, and push slice.
Approved as the primary durable integration, validation, adoption, and rollback evidence.
Approved as the immutable path-by-path source disposition and hash manifest required by Issue 001.
Approved as the narrow regression seam for completed foundry capabilities and downstream readiness.
Approved to register the integration readiness regression in canonical tracker verification.
Approved to add a publishability and redaction boundary after security review found private health context in a durable testing session.
Approved to reject sensitive free text and absolute paths before durable testing-session writes.
Approved for write-time and validation-time privacy regression coverage.
Approved to replace current-worktree coupling with stable historical workflow-foundry-015 commit-scope verification.

deliverable_migration.approval_note: The operator approved a dedicated task to resolve workflow-foundry-015 integration drift and requested direct PRD synthesis without grilling.

allowed_support_artifacts.purpose: Define the conflict-safe integration contract, acceptance seams, and adoption boundary.
Record blocker-ordered integration, reconciliation, validation, and adoption slices.
Classify and hash every source dirty or untracked path before adoption.
Record phase approvals, execution evidence, and completion state.
Prove completed foundry capability state and downstream dependency readiness without granting writes.
Include the integration readiness regression in canonical tracker verification.
Define the publishability and redaction boundary for durable testing-session state.
Reject sensitive free text and private absolute paths at testing-session boundaries.
Prove unsafe testing-session events are rejected before write and during validation.
Verify the historical 015 change scope without coupling to unrelated current worktree changes.
Expose the integration task and reconciled completion state.
Preserve the completed typed workflow construction dependency state.
Preserve the completed build-workflow-product capability state.

required_guidance.evidence: The integration follows the approved conflict-safe branch, tracker reconciliation, validation, and checkpoint contract.

behavior_evidence.raw_prompt: Validate the isolated integration candidate, completed 006 and 015 capability state, canonical product-builder discovery, downstream non-advancement, and testing-session privacy boundaries.
behavior_evidence.repository_context: The candidate is an isolated worktree based on the complete workflow-foundry-006 and workflow-foundry-015 feature lineage with semantic reconciliation of newer dirty tracker state.
behavior_evidence.raw_output: Canonical tracker data suite passed 64 tests with 0 failures, including integration lifecycle, product-builder discovery, downstream non-advancement, sensitive-text screening, and cross-platform absolute-path rejection.
behavior_evidence.expected_route: Preserve completed foundry capability state, expose build-workflow-product canonically, keep downstream tasks at their recorded phases, and reject non-repository testing-session paths.
behavior_evidence.observed_phase_result: pass: isolated integration candidate satisfies the deterministic state and privacy regressions

validation_results.evidence: npm run test:data completed with 64 passing tests and no failures.

behavior_evidence.raw_prompt: Independently review the reconciled integration candidate for correctness, tracker integrity, privacy, provenance, path portability, validation integrity, and unsafe publication or push risks.
behavior_evidence.repository_context: Two independent reviewer lanes re-reviewed the isolated candidate after correcting the circular lifecycle assertion, privacy overclaim, and Windows absolute-path bypass.
behavior_evidence.raw_output: Correctness and security re-reviews both returned PASS with no remaining critical or high blockers. They independently confirmed root validation, 64/64 data tests, diff integrity, commit-stable 015 history, conservative lifecycle states, cross-platform path rejection, and accurate defense-in-depth privacy language.
behavior_evidence.expected_route: Approve code-review entry only after independent correctness and security lanes report no unresolved critical or high blockers.
behavior_evidence.observed_phase_result: pass: independent correctness and security re-reviews found no unresolved critical or high blockers

validation_results.evidence: Both independent reviewer lanes returned PASS after verifying the repaired candidate and its privacy boundary.

session_log.event: Created a dedicated tracker-maintenance task after the operator identified that the completed workflow-foundry-015 branch remained unmerged and was confusing or blocking downstream workflow-product tasks. The operator requested direct full PRD synthesis without grilling.

Self-grilled the integration against branch ancestry, dirty-state preservation, overlapping file ownership, downstream dependency readiness, rollback, validation seams, and push authority. Rejected direct dirty-main integration and approved the PRD artifact for a clean isolated integration candidate followed by semantic tracker reconciliation and an explicit adoption checkpoint.

Advanced directly from intake to PRD at the operator's instruction to skip user-facing grilling. The next action is issue decomposition; no integration branch, merge, reconciliation, commit, main update, or push is approved in the PRD phase.

Converted the reviewed PRD into four blocker-ordered slices for isolated inventory, versioned tracker reconciliation, downstream readiness plus review, and adoption plus push. The operator authorized continuing through full implementation and push.

Entered implementation after the integrated validator exposed and the tracker reconciliation repaired missing migration metadata, preload drift, and Health 007 code-review contract readiness without weakening validation or advancing downstream phases.

Entered code review after the canonical 64-test data suite passed and independent correctness and security re-reviews reported no remaining critical or high blockers. The review repairs made lifecycle assertions non-circular, classified sensitive-text scanning as defense in depth, and rejected POSIX, Windows drive, UNC, and device absolute paths.
